title: Stripe — Pricing
description: Reproduction of stripe.com/pricing as a Forge CmsPage. T660 / T73 dogfood: every gap surfaced becomes a Forge ticket.

sections.title: Only pay for what you use
sections.lede: Integrated per-transaction pricing with no setup fees, monthly fees, or hidden costs. Start your integration to get instant access to the Stripe API.

sections.title: Integrated pricing
body: Combine Stripe's products to build a custom solution and only pay for what you use.

GAP-T660-1: Stripe shows three tier cards (Integrated · Customized · In-person) here. Forge has no Pricing section variant — the cards collapse into prose paragraphs until we add one. See FORGE_GAPS.md.

sections.title: Integrated — 2.9% + 30¢ per successful card charge
body: All transactions are secured with PCI-DSS Level 1 compliance, end-to-end encryption, and Radar machine-learning fraud protection — included at no additional cost.

sections.title: Customized — let's talk
body: Designed for businesses with large payment volumes or unique business models. Includes Interchange-Plus pricing, country-specific overrides, custom payout schedules, and dedicated account management.
Contact sales to discuss your volume + product mix.

sections.title: In-person — 2.7% + 5¢ per successful card swipe
body: Stripe Terminal: 2.7% + 5¢ per successful card swipe, dip, or tap.

rows.v: Machine-learning + 100k+ adaptive rules across the Stripe network.
Stripe handles chargebacks + represents you to the issuer.
Level 1 PCI-DSS certified. Pass-through compliance via Elements.
Real-time revenue, payouts, customer cohorts, recurring metrics.
Stripe.js, iOS, Android, React Native, with TypeScript types first-class.
Shopify, Squarespace, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, Wix — pre-built integrations.

sections.title: Volume discounts and country-specific overrides
body: Custom pricing is available for companies with large payment volumes, high average transaction value, or unique business models. Contact sales to learn more about Stripe Premium support, multi-product discounts, and country-specific Interchange-Plus rates.

GAP-T660-2: Stripe's actual pricing page includes a country picker (changes currency + rates) and a savings calculator (input monthly volume → discount tier). Both are interactive widgets. Forge currently has no widget primitives. Surfaces a T70 sub-task for typed interactive widgets in the CMS schema.

sections.text: GAP-T660-3: this rebuild uses only the seven CmsSection variants Forge ships today (Hero, Group, CardFeed, Banner, Form, Heading, KvPair). Stripe's actual page uses ~15 distinct section archetypes. Visual diff against the original screenshot is intentionally NON-pixel-faithful; the gap report (FORGE_GAPS.md) is the deliverable.
